Beta testing mode Build 0.8 Beta

Welcome, beta tester. This self-guided study webapp was built with artificial intelligence assistance and human review. It may contain errors, incomplete items, outdated wording, or display issues. Skill Labs are still being completed. You are welcome to try it, and feedback is appreciated.

Sleep Pathways Guild • Independent self-guided exam practice

RPSGT EXAM Self Guided Study

A self-guided study and practice companion for RPSGT exam preparation. Use drills, visual labs, mock exams, missed review, and references to organize your study.

Important exam-prep disclaimer: RPSGT EXAM Self Guided Study is a beta-stage independent educational self-study and practice tool by Sleep Pathways Guild. It was built with artificial intelligence assistance and human review, and it may contain errors, omissions, outdated wording, display issues, or incomplete sections. The Skill Labs area is still under development, and feedback is welcome. This app is not affiliated with, endorsed, sponsored, or approved by the Board of Registered Polysomnographic Technologists (BRPT), the American Academy of Sleep Medicine (AASM), the American Association of Sleep Technologists (AAST), or any other credentialing or professional organization unless specifically stated. RPSGT, CPSGT, CCSH, BRPT, AASM, AAST, and related names, marks, exam blueprints, and source materials belong to their respective owners. Sleep Pathways Guild does not own, reproduce, or claim rights to BRPT exam content, proprietary exam questions, or official exam materials. This app provides original educational practice questions and learning aids designed to support self-guided review. It does not provide medical advice, clinical direction, patient-care guidance, diagnosis, treatment recommendations, or clinical decision support. No passing score, credential outcome, employment result, or exam success is promised or guaranteed. Users are responsible for confirming current exam eligibility, handbooks, rules, policies, blueprints, scoring references, and professional requirements through the official credentialing organizations and current professional standards. By using this beta webapp, you agree to use it for educational review only and to report concerns, errors, suggestions, or upgrade ideas through the available Sleep Pathways Guild contact method. Thank you for your patience while this beta continues to improve.
